title: 12P Fake Christmas Holly Sprigs Green Holly Leaves Branches with Red Berry,Holly Leaves Christmas Pine Artificial Berry Stems Decor,Xmas Foliage Berries Holly Bouquets for Craft Flower Wreaths Decor
features: 🪅【Package】You will 12 pieces of artificial Holly Sprigs which consist of Fake holly berries and holly leaves.

🪽【Size】The diameter of the leafy berry is approximately 13cm/5.1 inches, and the diameter of the red berry is approximately 1.2cm/0.47 inches.Every piece of leaf has two different shades of green and veins, vivid and real looking.They Are Beautifully Made, Light And Durable, And Not Easy To Break.Let You Feel The Strong Atmosphere Of Christmas.

❄️【Realistic & Natural Looking】Each Christmas berry branch is decorated with bright plump berries, green holly leaves branches, beautiful and charming, simple yet elegant, and just the right amount of Christmassy.

🫎【Wide Application】You Can Use These Lovely Berries Stems To Create Floral Decorations For Your Farmhouse Decor, Baskets, Coffee Bar, Shelf, Vase. Also Use Them As Presents To Give Away To Your Friends Or Family Members.
💌【Service】 If you have any questions, please contact us in time, we will give you the most satisfactory answer and solution in time.
description: Product description 12P Fake Christmas Holly Sprigs Green Holly Leaves Branches with Red Berry,Holly Leaves Christmas Pine Artificial Berry Stems Decor,Xmas Foliage Berries Holly Bouquets for Craft Flower Wreaths Decor Safety Warning This artificial plant is made of plastic.
